name: ZubairHub Dev Environment
updateContentCommand:
sudo apt update && sudo apt
      install -y software-properties-common && sudo
      add-apt-repository -y ppa:deadsnakes/ppa && sudo apt
      update && sudo apt install -y python3.14 python3.14-venv
      python3.14-dev && pip install --upgrade pip uv && [ -f
      packages.txt ] && sudo apt install -y $(cat packages.txt)
      && uv venv --python 3.13 && source .venv/bin/activate &&
      uv pip install -r requirements.txt

postAttachCommand.init:
echo '✅ Dev Container Ready! Using Python
      3.13.'
